ItacPersonItem.Notes: Manzini received his doctorate in civil and canon law at the University of Bologna in 1623. At the Addormentati Academy in Genoa, Manzini delivered the oration `I tre concorrenti amorosi`, which was subsequently published (Genova-Bologna 1630). See his biography by Luigi Matt, in DBI.
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
